description_long: This object consists of four potted flowers with pale lavender petals, each supported by a thick green stem and broad, ovate green leaves. The flowers are in various stages of bloom, with some fully open and others still in bud form. The petals are large, slightly pointed, and arranged in a radial, whorled pattern, overlapping at the base and spreading outward. Each plant is housed in a simple, round brown pot, and a single detached leaf lies on the ground between them. The stems are segmented and robust, with two to three leaves per stem, and the overall appearance is stylized and cartoon-like. The flowers and leaves have a matte finish, giving them a soft, non-reflective look.
description: A group of four stylized potted flowers with pale lavender petals, green stems, and broad green leaves, arranged in brown pots.
description_view_0: Front view showing two fully open flowers and two buds, with a clear view of the petal arrangement and a detached leaf on the ground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the open flower and the curvature of the stems, with the buds facing away.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the flowers and buds, emphasizing the symmetry and leaf placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open flower in profile and the arrangement of leaves along the stems.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled pattern, overlapping at the base and spreading outward symmetrically from the center of each flower.
